name: 8L + BigramHash(12288, dim=128) + Batch Scaling + Systematic HyperOpt (1xH100, 129 experiments)
author: CrimsonSithira
blurb: 8 layers, 4x MLP (relu^2), BigramHash 12288 with dim=128 projection. 129 systematic experiments mapping hyperparameter scaling laws for throughput-constrained training. Key: batch size scaling (131K tokens), WD as artifact compression knob (WD=0.048 -> 15.9MB). 1x H100 SXM, 10min.
